title: Korean-Style Japanese Stew
description: A fusion of Japanese and Korean flavors in a hearty stew.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and ginger; cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add Korean chili flakes; cook for 1 minute.
Add cabbage; cook until slightly wilted, about 3 minutes.
Add beef broth, soy sauce, and intense soy sauce; stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, until cabbage is tender, about 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions and toasted sesame seeds if desired.
